ogTitle: Kangy Angy vs Kanimbla: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kangy Angy and Kanimbla.
heading: Kangy Angy vs Kanimbla — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kangy Angy, New South Wales and Kanimbla, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kanimbla has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Kangy Angy (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kangy Angy or Kanimbla safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kangy Angy has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Kanimbla scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kangy Angy scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Kanimbla scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kangy Angy or Kanimbla?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kanimbla has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
